title: senecio × neapolitanus
intro: Senecio × neapolitanus, also known as the Neapolitan ragwort, is a hybrid of the Senecio aquaticus and Senecio jacobaea plants. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties attributed to its alkaloids and pyrrolizidine compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio × neapolitanus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
